java: class Main { public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println("Hello, World!"); }}
class Main { public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println(3 + 4); }}
class Main { static int sq(int x) { return x*x; } public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println(sq(5)); }}
class Main { static long factorial(int n) { return n > 1 ? n * factorial(n-1) : 1; } public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println(factorial(5)); }}
class Main { static int fib(int n) { return n > 1 ? fib(n-1)+fib(n-2) : n; } public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println(fib(10)); }}
class Main { public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println(java.util.stream.IntStream.of(1,2,3,4,5).sum()); }}
class Main { public static void main(String[] args) { var r = java.util.stream.IntStream.of(1,2,3,4,5).map(x->x*x).toArray(); System.out.println(java.util.Arrays.toString(r)); }}
class Main { public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println(7 > 5 ? 100 : 0); }}
class Main { public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println("Hello".length()); }}
class Main { public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println("Hello" + "World"); }}
class Main { public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println(5); }}
class Main { public static void main(String[] args) { for(int i=0;i<5;i++) System.out.println(i+1); }}
class Main { public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println(Math.max(3, 7)); }}
class Main { public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println(4 % 2 == 0); }}
class Main { public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println(Math.abs(-7)); }}
class Main { public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println((int)Math.pow(2,10)); }}
class Main { static String greet(String name) { return "Hello, "+name+"!"; } public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println(greet("World")); }}
class Main { public static void main(String[] args) { for(int i=5;i>0;i--) System.out.println(i); }}

javascript: let s=0; for(let i=1;i<=10;i++) s+=i; console.log(s)
java: class Main { public static void main(String[] args) { int s=0; for(int i=1;i<=10;i++) s+=i; System.out.println(s); }}
